menu_message_templates_tooltip: To edit/add the message templates for quick curated responses. Also for Whatsapp template use. More features coming soon.

menu_notification_tooltip: New incoming message (new customer). For grab mode team, only the fastest team member joining the conversation can join the conversation
menu_llm_provider_tooltip: Allows users to connect and manage multiple language model providers in one place. Users can configure providers, select available models, and assign specific providers or models to each agent or task.
menu_guardrail_provider_tooltip: Connect and manage custom guardrail providers for content safety. Configure providers like OpenAI Moderation, LlamaGuard, NVIDIA NIM NeMo, or custom HTTP APIs to check messages for safety.
menu_generate_external_token_tooltip: Create a third-party access token that external backends can use to call our API.
